title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: MOUNT EMILY SAFE CENTER CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations, and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site and off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community training. 2107 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of all types of abuse and domestic violence or neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 963-0602 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 963-0602 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Morrow, Union, and Wallowa Counties Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOUNT EMILY SAFE CENTER
